caption: The video depicts a group of four individuals, all wearing face masks, engaged in a discussion within what appears to be a medical or educational setting, possibly during a simulation week as indicated by the text in the bottom right corner. The central figure, who seems to be leading the conversation, is gesturing with her hands while speaking, likely explaining a concept or giving instructions. The other three participants are attentively listening and facing her, suggesting an interactive session. The environment includes typical medical equipment and a curtain, reinforcing the clinical context. The atmosphere appears focused and collaborative, indicative of a learning or training scenario.
